arsub 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 arsub
USAGE:
Subscsribe to label:
  arsub subscribe --before "03/25/2026 09:37:13 +00:00" --label area-GC
  area-roslyn --repo dot-net/runtime --since "03/18/2026 09:37:13 +00:00"

  --label            Required. Label

  --since            Only issues updated after this value

  --before           Only issues updated before this value

  --verbose          Turn on verbose output.

  --debug            Turn on debug output.

  --what-if          Do not change anything - just simulate output on console.

  --output-format    (Default: text) Desired output type of arsub. Valid values
                     are 'json', 'text' and 'markdown'. Case sensitive.

  --repo             GitHub repository id if format {owner}/{name}

  --github-pat       Personal access token used to authenticate GitHub.

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.
